query:
SELECT 
  p.id AS pdi_id,
  p.titulo AS pdi_titulo,
  p.status AS pdi_status,
  u.name AS colaborador_nome,
  u.role AS colaborador_role,
  u.email AS colaborador_email,
  pv.id AS validacao_id,
  pv.aprovadoEm AS validado_em,
  pv.liderId AS validado_por_id
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
ORDER BY p.id;

SELECT

  p.titulo AS pdi_titulo,
  p.status AS pdi_status,
  u.name AS colaborador_nome,
  u.role AS colaborador_role,
  u.email AS colaborador_email,
  pv.id AS validacao_id,
  pv.aprovadoEm AS validado_em,
  pv.liderId AS validado_por_id
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
ORDER BY p.id;
